display.purpose: Section headings and hero status boards.

body.purpose: Post content text and workspace copy flows.

shadows.name: Threads Floating Shadow
shadows.purpose: Hard, premium vertical elevation for top-level floating capture items.

motion.name: Adaptive Fast Easing
motion.purpose: Snappy, springy tactile response for button presses and dialog reveals.

components.name: Floating Action Button
components.description: Threads-inspired circular quick trigger for fast post assembly.
components.html: <button class="ds-fab-trigger"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 20h9"></path><path d="M16.5 3.5a2.12 2.12 0 0 1 3 3L7 19l-4 1 1-4Z"></path></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-fab-trigger { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: #09090b; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #27272a; box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.36); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background-color 0.2s; } .ds-fab-trigger:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05); background-color: #18181b; }

components.name: Standard Button
components.description: Standard call to action within task-lists and sidebar controllers.
components.css: .ds-btn-standard { padding: 8px 14px; background-color: #262626; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 10px; border: none; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s; } .ds-btn-standard:hover { opacity: 0.9; }

narrative.overview: A Swiss-modernist, high-contrast monochrome design system characterized by heavy whitespace, thin lines, rigid structural framing, and deliberate rare accents. No gradients. No soft shadows. Every UI element is an active worker.
keyCharacteristics: Typographical priority of Geist Variable for X post validation

rules.name: The Monochrome Core Rule
rules.body: The primary identity must remain black-and-white. Color is used strictly to declare state or priority.

rules.name: The Border-As-Structure Rule
rules.body: Use razor-thin 1px border lines to segment views instead of utilizing nested block background fills.

dos: Do stick to pure monochrome interfaces with amber highlights for inspiration blocks.
Do use whitespace-pre-wrap and embedded line breaks for social post readability.
donts: Don't use neon overlays, warm gradients, or heavy multi-layered backdrop gradients.
Don't add random decorative icons or decorative emojis that add zero functional clarity.
